message:
style(engine): apply clippy from_ref and clean up test comments in policy_checkpoint

- Replace &[sk] with std::slice::from_ref(&sk) to avoid unnecessary clone
  in two checkpoint builder test calls
- Remove stale explanatory comments that described reasoning steps rather
  than test intent
- Simplify chain linkage verification comment to match actual assertion

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
